content:
✨ pdf-rag-app | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enabling users to have conversational interactions with the content of PDF documents.
✨ Key Features: • RAG application for chatting with PDF files • Vectorizes uploaded PDFs • Uses pre-trained models for text generation • ReactJS and TypeScript frontend • FastAPI backend
📖 Summary: PageSage is a web application that enables users to interact with PDF documents by leveraging Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG). It allows users to upload PDFs, which are then vectorized and processed by a language model to answer user queries within the context of the document.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
